heading: Civil aviation security research and development
label: 48107 Civil aviation security research and development
text: After the review under is completed, necessary amounts may be appropriated to the Secretary of Transportation out of the Airport and Airway Trust Fund established under section 9502 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 () to make grants under section 44912(a)(4)(A).section 44912(b) of this title26 U.S.C. 9502
